title: Fear Cabin: The Last Weekend of Summer
original_title: Fear Cabin: The Last Weekend of Summer
overview: Six friends rent a cabin in the middle of the woods on the last weekend of summer and set out to have an amazing time full of partying and drinking. Little do they know that they will be sharing this cabin with an unexpected guest, will they make it out alive?
